# 🧪 FAOS Master Test Architect Plugin

> Cowork Plugin | Exported 2026-03-13

## Overview

**Master Test Architect**

Test architect specializing in CI/CD, automated frameworks, and scalable quality gates.

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/tea:framework` | Initialize production-ready test framework architecture |
| `/tea:atdd` | Generate E2E tests first, before starting implementation |
| `/tea:automate` | Generate comprehensive test automation |
| `/tea:test-design` | Create comprehensive test scenarios |
| `/tea:trace` | Map requirements to tests (Phase 1) and make quality gate decision (Phase 2) |
| `/tea:nfr-assess` | Validate non-functional requirements |
| `/tea:ci` | Scaffold CI/CD quality pipeline |
| `/tea:test-review` | Review test quality using comprehensive knowledge base and best practices |

## Bundled Skills

| Skill | Priority |
|-------|----------|
| `agent-evaluation` | high |
| `github-workflow-automation` | high |
| `tdd-orchestrator` | high |
| `e2e-testing-patterns` | recommended |
| `code-review-excellence` | recommended |
| `azure-microsoft-playwright-testing-ts` | recommended |

## Installation

### Claude Code (Desktop)
1. Download or clone this plugin directory
2. In Claude Desktop: Settings > Plugins > Install from folder
3. Select the `faos-tea/` directory

### Enterprise Marketplace
1. Add this plugin to your private plugin marketplace GitHub repo
2. Team members install via: Settings > Plugins > Marketplace
